name: Avocado Toast with Poached Egg
description: Creamy avocado on sourdough bread topped with a perfectly poached egg.

name: Grilled Salmon with Asparagus
description: Fresh Atlantic salmon grilled with lemon and served with roasted asparagus.

name: Quinoa Salad with Chickpeas
description: Refreshing quinoa salad with crunchy chickpeas, cucumbers, and a tahini dressing.

name: Beef Stir-Fry with Broccoli
description: Tender beef slices stir-fried with fresh broccoli in a ginger-soy sauce.

name: Greek Yogurt with Mixed Berries
description: Creamy Greek yogurt topped with fresh blueberries, strawberries, and a drizzle of honey.

name: Chicken Pesto Pasta
description: Whole wheat pasta tossed with chicken breast and fresh basil pesto.

name: Oatmeal with Almonds and Banana
description: Hearty rolled oats cooked with almond milk, topped with sliced bananas and crushed almonds.

name: Tofu Scramble with Spinach
description: Crumpled tofu sauteed with fresh spinach, turmeric, and nutritional yeast.

name: Lentil Soup
description: Traditional red lentil soup with carrots, onions, and cumin.

name: Steak with Sweet Potato
description: Pan-seared ribeye steak served with mashed sweet potato.
